IRouteVerbDeserializationInputType Property

One Identity Manager API Server
Gets or sets the type used for deserialization of the input data sent by the client. If none is specified, the value of InputType is used.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.ApiManager
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
Type DeserializationInputType { get; }

Property Value

Type: Type
Remarks
For example, the declared input type can be a dynamically built type; but we might use a simple dictionary to process the input. You can use NullBodyType as a sentinel value to skip deserialization of the data.
See Also

Reference

IRouteVerb Interface
QBM.CompositionApi.ApiManager Namespace
